categories.label: Agents
categories.desc: Reasoning agents grounded in your content + memory.

items.name: Agent
items.desc: The agent loop: Claude drafts a hook, tests it, and remembers the outcome.

items.name: Digest agent
items.desc: Weekly digest agent: what the brain did last week, readable with Monday coffee.

items.name: Idea agent
items.desc: Idea & repurposing agent: suggests what to make next and how to repurpose what you've made,

items.name: Research agent
items.desc: The research agent: Claude, grounded in YOUR content, with memory.

categories.label: Tools
categories.desc: The MCP tools that reach the brain from any AI client.

items.name: search
items.desc: Search your second brain (your videos, posts, AI chats, notes, ideas/scripts, and code

items.name: fetch
items.desc: Fetch the full content of one search result by its `id`. Returns {id, title, text, url,

items.name: overview
items.desc: A high-level map of the brain: how many items, broken down by platform and by content

items.name: source_status
items.desc: LIVE health + freshness: is the sync pipeline ALIVE (heartbeat from its machine),

items.name: wiki
items.desc: Fetch a compiled WIKI PAGE: a synthesized overview of everything in the brain about a

items.name: topics
items.desc: List the compiled wiki topics: the synthesized knowledge pages over the user's content.

items.name: recent
items.desc: The k most recently published items in the brain, newest first.

items.name: by_series
items.desc: List items in a content SERIES. Call with NO series to see the available series + counts;

items.name: related
items.desc: Find the items SEMANTICALLY NEAREST to one anchor: neighbors by meaning between

items.name: ingest_note
items.desc: Save a note/idea to the brain, embedded for future semantic search.

items.name: save_chat
items.desc: Capture THIS conversation into the second brain, in real time: no data export

categories.label: Playbooks
categories.desc: Prompt recipes any MCP client runs with the read tools.

items.name: research_brief
items.desc: Research a question grounded in the user's own content, with citations: the repo's research-agent loop, run by the client.

items.name: interview_prep
items.desc: Prep a briefing for meeting/interviewing a person: what the user has covered with/about them before, plus what's new.

items.name: caption_pack
items.desc: Draft platform-native captions for new content, in the user's own voice learned from their posted captions.

items.name: weekly_review
items.desc: A weekly review: what's new in the brain, how it connects to existing knowledge, and what to make next.

categories.label: Sources
categories.desc: Loaders that pull your content in (official APIs and your exports).

items.name: Chatgpt
items.desc: Collect step (ChatGPT chats): your OpenAI data export -> the brain.

items.name: Claude chats
items.desc: Collect step (Claude chats): your exported conversations -> the brain.

items.name: Claude code
items.desc: Collect step (Claude Code): your local session transcripts -> the brain.

items.name: Freshness
items.desc: Source freshness check: how long since each source last got new data?

items.name: Gdrive
items.desc: Collect step (Google Drive): folders you SHARE with the loader -> the brain.

items.name: Instagram
items.desc: Ingest your Instagram content + performance into the brain via the **Instagram API with

items.name: Instagram export
items.desc: Backfill Instagram from a data export: captions + dates + spoken-word transcripts.

items.name: Linkedin
items.desc: Ingest LinkedIn posts into the brain from a JSON file of {time, text} objects.

items.name: Linkedin apify
items.desc: Collect step (LinkedIn): scheduled self-scrape of YOUR OWN public posts via a

items.name: Linkedin harvest
items.desc: Load a LinkedIn activity harvest (browser-collected JSON) into the brain.

items.name: Notion
items.desc: Collect step (Notion): your content calendar + planning/brand pages -> the brain.

items.name: Obsidian
items.desc: Collect step (Obsidian / any local vault): notes AND documents -> the brain.

items.name: Substack
items.desc: Collect step (Substack): your published newsletter/blog posts -> the brain.

items.name: Youtube
items.desc: Collect step (YouTube): yt-dlp metadata -> canonical Markdown + Oracle.

categories.label: Jobs & loops
categories.desc: Background automation that keeps the brain fed and fresh.

items.name: Apply schema
items.desc: Apply the schema files (oracle/schema/0*.sql) over a db.connect() connection.

items.name: Classify private
items.desc: Clean up imported chats: separate PRIVATE material and prune OFF-TOPIC noise, so the content

items.name: Classify series
items.desc: Tag a content series by STYLE: for series whose published posts don't name the series.

items.name: Consolidate
items.desc: Standalone entrypoint: re-consolidate the agent's episodic memory into semantic facts.

items.name: Context pack
items.desc: Generate a paste-able CONTEXT PACK from the brain: the 'personal context markdown'

items.name: Copy local to cloud
items.desc: Copy the brain from the local Oracle container to the cloud Autonomous DB.

items.name: Lint wiki
items.desc: Wiki lint: surface review candidates over the compiled wiki. READ-ONLY; never auto-applies.

items.name: Load model cloud
items.desc: Load the ONNX embedding model ('MINILM') into the database directly as a BLOB.

items.name: Memory review
items.desc: Memory hygiene review: the FORGETTING report. Report-only: it never deletes.

items.name: Oamp sweep
items.desc: Daily privacy sweep of the OAMP memory store (the default backend).

items.name: Reset sample
items.desc: Wipe the sample content (and everything derived from it) for a clean start.

items.name: Review
items.desc: Nightly review (propose-only): surfaces things to look at; never changes anything.

items.name: Search
items.desc: Search your brain by meaning, from the terminal.

items.name: Sync
items.desc: Keep the brain current: and never let the derived layers go stale.

items.name: Youtube transcripts
items.desc: Enrich YouTube content with TRANSCRIPTS.
